title: The Box That Pip Built
description: Move one step per turn. Box fragments (N) are pushed one step by walking into them. Each fragment stores a 4-bit bitmask (bit0=up, bit1=right, bit2=down, bit3=left) indicating which sides are connected to an adjacent fragment or wall; F (=15) means all 4 sides connected. Win by pushing every fragment onto a target cell (X) such that all 4 of its sides are connected. Rocks block movement; carry a pickaxe (P) and walk into a rock to break it.
